hooks.command: rm -rf /tmp/octools 2>/dev/null; git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/InnerScopeHearing/otchealth-claude-tools /tmp/octools 2>/dev/null; bash /tmp/octools/setup/session-start.sh 2>/dev/null; [ -f "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/HANDOFF.md" ] && { echo '=== HANDOFF.md (read and continue from Next up) ==='; cat "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/HANDOFF.md"; }
